title: no valid OpenPGP data found
body:
Hi!

Following the [documentation](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/master/install.md), in

```bash
# Debian 10:
$ echo 'deb http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/ /' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list
$ wget -nv https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/Debian_10/Release.key -O- | sudo apt-key add -
```

I get the error:
```
The certificate's owner does not match hostname ‘download.opensuse.org’
gpg: no valid OpenPGP data found.
```

And

```shell
# wget -nv https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/Debian_10/Release.key
The certificate's owner does not match hostname ‘download.opensuse.org’
```

And

```shell
# wget --no-check-certificate -nv https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/Debian_10/Release.key
The certificate's owner does not match hostname ‘download.opensuse.org’
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/Debian_10/Release.key:
2020-06-03 00:41:07 ERROR 404: Not Found.
```


The `Debian_10` folder does not exist:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/17688846/83582199-36c60780-a517-11ea-9c09-0aac2ba85a5f.png)

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

Can you try again, please? I do see content in those repositories now.
